mnemonics.title: Software Attributes
mnemonics.content: FREDU - Functionality, Reliability, Efficiency, Durability, Usability

mnemonics.title: SDLC Phases
mnemonics.content: R D C T I I M - Requirements, Design, Coding, Testing, Implementation, Integration, Maintenance

acronyms.usage: Framework for developing software through sequential phases from requirements to maintenance
Tools that automate software development processes
Creating multiple independent software versions for fault tolerance
Methods for software components to communicate with each other

visualTips.visualization: Draw a graph showing hardware failure rate as an increasing curve (wear-out) and software failure rate as a decreasing curve initially then rising (due to bugs fixed, then obsolescence)
Create a hierarchical diagram with 'Software' at top, branching to System, Application, and Embedded with examples under each
Use a hexagon with each attribute at vertices showing interdependence - modifying one affects others

analogies.analogy: Like a recipe (software) vs kitchen appliances (hardware) - you can modify recipes easily but need new appliances to cook differently
Like building a skyscraper without architectural plans - chaos and collapse inevitable
Like maintaining a living garden - requires ongoing care, pruning, and adaptation to seasons
